title: Zuvo [50 Pack Takeaway Coffee Cups with Lids | Disposable Insulated Triple Wall Ripple Kraft Paper Coffee Cups for Takeaway Coffee, Tea or hot Liquids | Pack of 50 (12 Oz.), Black
features: TRIPLE-WALL HEAT RESISTANT CUP and TIGHTLY FITTED BLACK LIDS with INSULATION FOR SAFE GRIP HOLDING AND DRINKING; Improved over double walled design, Elegant presentation with no wasteful cup sleeves or java jacket needed. Also perfect for espresso, cappuccino, Latte, dessert coffee, cocoa, hot lemonade or any other hot beverage including a simple cup of hot water

VIRTUALLY HEATLESS - Literally the Coolest cups ever created. The Elegant Designed Thermal like Layers keep your drink warmer longer while the ripple wall keeps your hands and fingers cool. No more trips to the microwave or uncomfortable flimsy and loose cardboard sleeves.

STURDY AND DURABLE - Our Extra Thick Premium Kraft Paper can withstand multiple refills, making our to go cups a go to choice! Our Cups Contains 20% more Paper and include integrated sleeves for comfy handling. This just makes us the strongest most affordable high quality cup on the market.

FITTED SECURE LIDS - No more coffee stains on your shirts and pants! Our Resealable Lids are struggle free. The simple and easy design keeps your coffee hot and prevents leaking when you are on the go or driving in the car. Extra Tight Lids tend to crack so we adjusted the lip of our cups so they pop on with ease but are secured to perfection
QUALITY GUARANTEED; If not we will replace for free, product also insured for up to 5 Million USD
description: Product Description Previous page Next page What materials are typically used in the construction of disposable paper coffee cups? Disposable paper coffee cups are commonly made from a combination of paper and a thin plastic lining. The paper provides structure, while the plastic lining prevents leaks and helps insulate the cup. How are disposable paper coffee cups designed to withstand hot beverages without leaking or deforming? We use a combination of sturdy paperboard and a heat-resistant plastic lining to withstand hot beverages without leaking or deforming. Are disposable coffee cups easy to hold? How's the grip? With a ripple design, they offer an ergonomic grip, making them easy to hold securely.
